name: io.github.SimonTarara62/capitalcom-mcp-server
title: Capital.com MCP Server
description: Unofficial community MCP for the Capital.com Open API. Guarded two-phase trades; demo-first.

environmentVariables.name: CAP_ENV_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to a .env file holding credentials (alternative to inline secrets).

environmentVariables.name: CAP_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Capital.com API key (use a DEMO key first).

environmentVariables.name: CAP_ALLOW_TRADING
environmentVariables.description: Set true to enable order execution (off by default).

environmentVariables.name: CAP_ALLOWED_EPICS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated EPIC allowlist for trading, or ALL.
